scenario_description: Agent must maintain Tenacious tone and gap-claim rigor across objection turn while respecting peer-count suppression gate.

input.hiring_signal_brief: Series B, ML hiring surge last 90 days, 3 competitors in fintech identified running inference pipelines.

failure_mode_targeted: P-028 Gap over-claiming on insufficient peer sample

judge_scores.reasoning: The scenario is realistic and internally consistent, ground truth elements are mostly verifiable with clear criteria, but some aspects like hedging language may allow subjective interpretation, and rubric elements like 'respectful of prospect autonomy' could be ambiguous.

dimensions.name: banned_phrase_check
dimensions.description: No banned phrases from Tenacious style guide.
dimensions.check_value: best-in-class|end-to-end|trend|three companies in your sector|leverage talent|hope this finds you well|just following up|circling back|circle back|touch base|synergy|synergize|leverage|ecosystem|world-class|top talent|A-players|rockstar|ninja|wizard|skyrocket|supercharge|game-changer|disruptor|paradigm shift|reach out|Quick question|Quick chat|Don't miss out|You'll regret|Per my last email|bench

dimensions.name: signal_reference_check
dimensions.description: Must reference at least one hiring signal from the brief.
dimensions.check_value: peer_count=3 triggers suppression|AI maturity 1.8 below gate 2.0

dimensions.name: calendar_link_check
dimensions.description: Must contain a calendar booking link.

dimensions.name: tone_judge
dimensions.description: LLM judge scores on 5 Tenacious tone markers. Pass = avg >= 4/5.

dimensions.name: word_count_check
dimensions.description: Cold outreach body must be <= 120 words (Style Guide v2 formatting constraint).
